basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: Not more than 35 years. Age Relaxation: As per Government of India norms for SC/ST/OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./BTech/M.E./MTech/M.Sc. or equivalent in streams like Electronics & Communication Engineering /Computer Science/Mathematics/Engineering Physics/Engineering Mathematics with good academic background. Qualified in GATE or CSIR/UGC NET or any other National level examination conducted by the Central Government Departments/Institutions.
qualification.details: B.E./BTech/M.E./MTech/M.Sc. or equivalent in streams like Electronics & Communication Engineering /Computer Science/Mathematics/Engineering Physics/Engineering Mathematics with good academic background. Qualified in GATE or CSIR/UGC NET or any other National level examination conducted by the Central Government Departments/Institutions.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- per month + 20% HRA for two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month + 20% HRA for third year
salary_details.details: For the first two years: Rs. 37,000/- per month + 20% HRA. For the third year: Rs. 42,000/- per month + 20% HRA.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirements Interview (online/offline mode)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT ISM Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT ISM Dhanbad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT ISM Dhanbad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT ISM Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT ISM Dhanbad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT ISM Dhanbad is 20th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./BTech/M.E./MTech/M.Sc. or equivalent degree in relevant engineering or science disciplines. Additionally, they need to have qualified in GATE or CSIR/UGC NET or a similar national-level examination.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in the IIT ISM Dhanbad recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC candidates as per the Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected Junior Research Fellow will receive a stipend of Rs. 37,000/- per month plus 20% HRA for the first two years. For the third year, the stipend will be Rs. 42,000/- per month plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT ISM Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to fill out the application form through the provided link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on their academic merit and project requirements. Shortlisted candidates will then be called for an interview, which may be conducted in online or offline mode.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates regarding application fees.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the online application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of educational qualifications, experience certificates, age proof, valid cast certificate (if applicable), publications, awards, recommendation letter, CV with Photo, and GATE/NET/National level examination qualification certificate.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can click on the respective links to access them.
